subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God! Thou must needs, through all nights and days, be engaged in the praise and glorification of the Lord of all beings, inasmuch as [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله باید در کل لیالی و ایام بحمد و ثنای مالک انام مشغول باشی چه که
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @praise and encouragement, @knowledge; recognition of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
